      "title": "Prototype Pollution via __proto__ in deepMerge",
      "risk": "An attacker sends `{\"__proto__\": {\"isAdmin\": true}}` as request body. `deepMerge` recurses into `__proto__`, writing properties onto `Object.prototype`. Every object in the process now has `isAdmin === true`. This is a well-known RCE/privilege-escalation vector in Node.js.",
      "severity": "Critical",

      "fix": "Reject dangerous keys (`__proto__`, `constructor`, `prototype`) in deepMerge: add `if (key === '__proto__' || key === 'constructor' || key === 'prototype') continue;` at the top of the loop.
